sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112818" key="fwlew/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φωλ-εώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n112818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a hole,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χειά</foreign> dub.l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.418a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
